---
title: "Paracou TOMST from ALT"
author: Sylvain Schmitt -
date: today
date-format: medium
format: 
  gfm:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

ALT data from TOMST sensors in Paracou (listed data below). Available campaigns are :

-   20230330 - missing
-   20230525 - missing
-   20231016 - missing
-   20240506 - missing
-   20250624 - missing
-   20240920 - ok
-   20250418 - ok
-   20250930 - ok

```{r, comment=""}
fs::dir_tree()
```
